creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #1)
Yes, the fix you proposed is probably better.

I agree it's better to focus on the currently maintained GCC versions than EOL. But currently in order to install GCC 8 on powerpc64 we need to install anyway GCC 5, which is even more EOL. I think it's better to at least upgrade from GCC 5 to 6.
